creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
the new attachment is not a shar, it's some kind of sharutils script.  I don't know why it's provide instead of a shar.

Secondly, the MAINTAINER=ports@FreeBSD.org kills it

thirdly, a straight "bring back port using SVN" is probably wrong (not to mention it was broken with it was removed I recall).

As it is now, I would "reject" this PR.  If nothing changes, I will.
